title: Banisteriopsis cinerascens

The health benefits of Banisteriopsis cinerascens include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and provide antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Banisteriopsis cinerascens is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and extracts, often combined with other plants like Ayahuasca, to create traditional medicines for anxiety, depression, and sleep disorders.
